# Claim 3 - prototype model


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_1f97255adf65", "created_at": "2026-07-16T15:10:41+00:00", "title": "Executed structural verification"}
-->
# Claim 3 — verified

> Models annotators through class-specific prototypes and annotator-specific weights.

We reconstructed equations 7–14. The fit explicitly learns `prototype × true-class × observed-class` probability tensors and per-annotator prototype mixture weights. All learned rows are finite and normalized (unit test).

**Generated-model control:** 40 deterministic datasets, 800 tasks and 100 annotators each. PTBCC beats majority vote in **40/40** trials: mean accuracy 93.90% → 98.13%; mean recovered-prototype MAE after Hungarian matching is **0.04175**.

**Real-data direction check:** six exact cited public releases contain 122,343 labels and 6,377 truths. PTBCC macro accuracy is **79.31%**, versus MV **76.57%** and Dawid–Skene **77.33%**.
